title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: sos bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for sos is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The sos package contains a set of utilities that gather information from system hardware, logs, and configuration files. The information can then be used for diagnostic purposes and debugging.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] The /etc/crypttab file should be captured in sosreport (JIRA:RHEL-108949)  openshift_ovn module never runs because it tries to run using podman runtime (JIRA:RHEL-110512)  sosreport starts rhsm.service even it is stopped (JIRA:RHEL-112563)  [RFE] new plugin to collect some specific metadata from an AWS instance (JIRA:RHEL-114887)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121468)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 (JIRA:RHEL-121469)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 [rhel-9.4.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121470)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121471)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121472)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121476)  [foreman_installer] Scrub non-alphanumeric passwords in installer logs (JIRA:RHEL-121515)  [cleaner] Treat IPv6 netmask as part of obfuscated string (JIRA:RHEL-121517)  [plugins] Improved AAP plugins to capture more useful diagnostics (JIRA:RHEL-121524)  [cleaner] Make cleaner's obfuscate_file properly working (JIRA:RHEL-121531)  [openstack_nova] Improve scrubbing (JIRA:RHEL-121534)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121536)  Breaking change in use of sosreport introduced (JIRA:RHEL-125184)  [RHEL8] sos pulpcore plugin to have CSV tasks tables dump (JIRA:RHEL-126158)  sos rpm sanitization not working properly as some IPV6 addresses not getting masked (JIRA:RHEL-30469)

Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64 - Extended Update Support
Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server for Power LE - Update Services for SAP Solutions
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server - AUS
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems - Extended Update Support
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 - Update Services for SAP Solutions 10 x86_64

Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems

fixes.description: [RFE] The /etc/crypttab file should be captured in sosreport
openshift_ovn module never runs because it tries to run using podman runtime
sosreport starts rhsm.service even it is stopped
[RFE] new plugin to collect some specific metadata from an AWS instance
[foreman_installer] Scrub non-alphanumeric passwords in installer logs
[cleaner] Treat IPv6 netmask as part of obfuscated string
[plugins] Improved AAP plugins to capture more useful diagnostics
Breaking change in use of sosreport introduced
[RHEL8] sos pulpcore plugin to have CSV tasks tables dump
sos rpm sanitization not working properly as some IPV6 addresses not getting masked

full_text:
An update for sos is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The sos package contains a set of utilities that gather information from system hardware, logs, and configuration files. The information can then be used for diagnostic purposes and debugging.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] The /etc/crypttab file should be captured in sosreport (JIRA:RHEL-108949)  openshift_ovn module never runs because it tries to run using podman runtime (JIRA:RHEL-110512)  sosreport starts rhsm.service even it is stopped (JIRA:RHEL-112563)  [RFE] new plugin to collect some specific metadata from an AWS instance (JIRA:RHEL-114887)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121468)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 (JIRA:RHEL-121469)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 [rhel-9.4.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121470)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121471)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121472)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121476)  [foreman_installer] Scrub non-alphanumeric passwords in installer logs (JIRA:RHEL-121515)  [cleaner] Treat IPv6 netmask as part of obfuscated string (JIRA:RHEL-121517)  [plugins] Improved AAP plugins to capture more useful diagnostics (JIRA:RHEL-121524)  [cleaner] Make cleaner's obfuscate_file properly working (JIRA:RHEL-121531)  [openstack_nova] Improve scrubbing (JIRA:RHEL-121534)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.1 [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121536)  Breaking change in use of sosreport introduced (JIRA:RHEL-125184)  [RHEL8] sos pulpcore plugin to have CSV tasks tables dump (JIRA:RHEL-126158)  sos rpm sanitization not working properly as some IPV6 addresses not getting masked (JIRA:RHEL-30469)
